summary: REQ-2 (subtitle) appears implemented in Header.tsx, but the diff does not satisfy the core requirement of having exactly one (and still present) top header in the non-admin user flow. App.tsx now conditionally renders the Header only in admin mode, which likely removes the header entirely for normal users rather than de-duplicating it. The diff also introduces additional UI (admin toggle floating button) and modifies an explicitly immutable hook file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the app renders exactly one top header across the user flow by removing the duplicate Header rendering so only a single sticky header appears at the top (the header must not be duplicated on the Home page).
missing_requirements.reason: App.tsx now renders <Header /> only when isAdmin is true, which likely removes the header for the non-admin (HomePage) user experience instead of ensuring a single header there. The diff does not show removal of a duplicate header instance on the Home page; it shows gating the header by admin mode.

missing_requirements.requirement: Keep the authentication button (Login/Logout) aligned to the right within the single header, and ensure existing cart/login interactions still work after removing the duplicate header (including proceeding to payment from the cart drawer).
missing_requirements.reason: Because the header is conditionally rendered only for admin mode in App.tsx, the non-admin user flow may have no header at all, which would break/omit the Login/Logout control and cart interactions in the primary user experience. The diff summary is truncated for CartDrawer usage, so end-to-end proceed-to-payment behavior after de-duplication cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: Conditionally rendering the Header only for admin mode (effectively hiding the header for non-admin users).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest requires de-duplicating the header so exactly one header appears across the user flow (including Home/non-admin), not removing it from non-admin entirely.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a floating fixed-position Admin/User mode toggle button (Shield icon) and related localStorage admin-mode logic + forced reload.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; also conflicts with the constraint to not change anything else in the layout besides removing the duplicate header instance and updating the header subtitle.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified an explicitly immutable file path: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints state this file must not be modified.
